description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly red exterior and black accents on the top, base, and around the screen area. The front panel houses a large, slightly curved display screen, reminiscent of vintage CRT monitors, flanked by a blue control panel equipped with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The control panel is angled for ergonomic access and is bordered by a black section below the screen. The top of the cabinet includes a marquee area, which is solid red and lacks any visible artwork or branding. The side panels are plain red with no visible graphics or decals, and the rear panel is solid black. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and the cabinet stands at a height suitable for standing play.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with a red and black color scheme, featuring a curved display, blue control panel with joysticks and buttons, and a plain red marquee. The side panels are unadorned, emphasizing a simple, retro aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved display screen, blue control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons, and a plain red marquee above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's red side panel, the angled control panel, and the protruding black marquee and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid black back panel with no visible features or access points.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a red side panel and visible control panel layout.
attribute_screen_type: CRT-style display, curved, medium size, with a thick black bezel; screen appears to have a slight curvature typical of older arcade monitors.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged side-by-side for two-player play; blue panel with red and yellow button accents.
